samples.instruction: use pitcher to pour water into tall glass and wine glass
actions: twist open the pitcher lid
pick up the pitcher
pour water from the pitcher into the wine glass
place the pitcher on the black board right next to wine glass
twist the pitcher lid to close it
pick up the pitcher
pour water from the pitcher into the wine glass
move the tall glass closer to the wine glass
place the pitcher on the black board right and below the wine glass
twist the pitcher lid to open it slightly
pick up the pitcher
pour a bit of water from the pitcher into the tall glass
move the glass wine 7cm to the left
pour water from the pitcher into the tall glass until it's almost full
pour water from the pitcher into the wine glass until it's full
pour water from the pitcher into the tall glass until it's full
place the pitcher on the table
reposition the wine glass to the left center part of table
move the tall glass to the right-center part of the table
place the pitcher on the center part of the table between the two glasses

samples.instruction: wash the dishes in the sink
actions: turn on the kitchen faucet
wet the yellow sponge under the running water
put a dish soap on the dish sponge
wet and squeeze the yellow sponge under the running water
pick up the silver spoon from glass mug with cofee
wash the silver spoon with a sponge under running water
place the silver spoon on the kitchen towel and the above the black up
pick up the glass mug from the sink
wash the glass mug with a sponge under running water
place the glass mug on the kitchen towel and above the right most plate
pick up the yellow sponge from the sink
pick up the black mug from the sink
scrub the black mug with a sponge under running water in the sink
place the black mug on the kitchen towel and to the left of the glass mug
pick up the yellow sponge
pick up the clear glass from the sink
scrub and rinse a clear glass under running water in the sink
place the clear glass on top of the right most plate
pick up the yellow sponge
pick up the white saucer from the sink
scrub the white saucer with a sponge under running water in the sink
place the white saucer on top of the black cup
pick up the clear glass bowl from the sink
scrub and rinse a clear glass bowl with a sponge under running water in the sink
place the clear glass bowl on top of the black cup
pick up the white spatula from the sink
rinse the white spatula under running water in the sink
clean the sink with sponge
rinse and squeeze the sponge under running water in the sink and wash your hands
turn off the kitchen faucet

samples.instruction: use a spoon to stir contents in a bowl
actions: pick up the green bag with brown powder
pour brown powder from the green bag into the metal pan
new subtask
pick up the blue-shite cup from the left side of the table
pour water from the blue-white cup into the pan
place the blue cup on the left side of the table
pick up a white spatula
stir the brown liquid in the pan using a white spatula
place the pan containing orange liquid onto the black stovetop
